column1: # Base relation pairs: capital -> country, in French. One-to-one, fact-verifiable.
# All facts verified 2026-07-22 against the authoritative, non-LLM sources keyed below.
#   wp-capitals   = Wikipedia "List of national capitals"        (capital fact)
#   frwp-capitals = French Wikipedia "Liste des capitales du monde" (French spelling)
# Only pairs whose capital AND country are each a single token under the package
# forms (etats-unis, royaume-uni, pays-bas, nouvelle-zelande, le caire, ...) are excluded.
